vulnerabilities.description: sprintf with unbounded user input into fixed-size buffer

CWE122_heap_overflow.cpp.description: Heap buffer overflow: strcpy writes 31 bytes into 16-byte heap buffer.

CWE125_oob_read.cpp.description: Out-of-bounds read: accessing arr[len] when valid range is 0..len-1.

CWE131_wrong_buf_size.cpp.description: Incorrect buffer size: malloc(n) should be malloc(n * sizeof(Record)).

CWE134_format_string.cpp.description: Format string vulnerability: user_input used as printf format string.

CWE170_missing_null_term.cpp.description: Improper null termination: strncpy(dst,src,32) does not null-terminate if src >= 32 chars.

CWE191_integer_underflow.cpp.description: Integer underflow: unsigned subtraction wraps when b > a.

CWE194_sign_extension.cpp.description: Unexpected sign extension: negative char cast to size_t becomes huge value.

CWE195_signed_unsigned.cpp.description: Signed to unsigned comparison: negative user_len compares as very large unsigned.

CWE197_numeric_truncation.cpp.description: Numeric truncation: size_t to unsigned short loses upper bits.

vulnerabilities.description: Session key bytes printed to stdout

CWE242_dangerous_function.cpp.description: Use of inherently dangerous function: gets() has no bounds checking.

CWE252_unchecked_return.cpp.description: Unchecked return value: fopen may return NULL, fgets on NULL is UB.

CWE256_plaintext_password.cpp.description: Plaintext storage of password: password stored without hashing.

CWE327_broken_crypto.cpp.description: Use of broken cryptographic algorithm: trivial hash function, not suitable for security.

CWE362_race_condition.cpp.description: Race condition: shared_counter modified without synchronization.

CWE367_toctou.cpp.description: TOCTOU race: file state may change between stat() check and fopen().

CWE369_divide_by_zero.cpp.description: Divide by zero: no check for count == 0.

CWE377_insecure_temp.cpp.description: Insecure temporary file: tmpnam generates predictable filename, race condition possible.

CWE400_resource_consumption.cpp.description: Uncontrolled resource consumption: unbounded allocation in user-controlled loop.

vulnerabilities.description: Allocated buffer leaked on error return path

CWE404_improper_shutdown.cpp.description: Improper resource shutdown: file handle f leaked when malloc fails.

vulnerabilities.description: Context freed twice via repeated call

CWE457_uninitialized_var.cpp.description: Use of uninitialized variable: 'value' not set when flag <= 0.

CWE467_sizeof_pointer.cpp.description: Use of sizeof() on pointer type: copies 8 bytes instead of string length.

CWE468_pointer_scaling.cpp.description: Incorrect pointer scaling: misaligned access due to +1 byte offset.

vulnerabilities.description: fopen return value not checked before use

CWE478_missing_default.cpp.description: Missing default case in switch: CMD_DELETE not handled, falls through silently.

CWE480_incorrect_operator.cpp.description: Use of incorrect operator: == binds tighter than &, condition always false.

CWE562_return_stack_addr.cpp.description: Return of stack variable address: &x invalid after function returns.

CWE587_fixed_address.cpp.description: Assignment of fixed address to pointer: writing to hardcoded address 0xDEADBEEF.

CWE590_free_not_heap.cpp.description: Free of memory not on the heap: freeing address of stack variable.

CWE676_dangerous_func.cpp.description: Use of potentially dangerous function: sprintf without bounds checking.

CWE680_int_to_buf_overflow.cpp.description: Integer overflow to buffer overflow: n*sizeof(int) may wrap, malloc allocates less than memset writes.

CWE704_incorrect_cast.cpp.description: Incorrect type conversion: casting double* to int* violates strict aliasing.

CWE758_undefined_behavior.cpp.description: Undefined behavior: left shift by 33 exceeds bit width of int (32).

CWE761_free_wrong_offset.cpp.description: Free of pointer not at start of buffer: buf was advanced by 10 bytes.

CWE762_mismatched_memory.cpp.description: Mismatched memory management: new[] paired with free() instead of delete[].

CWE773_missing_close.cpp.description: Missing close of file descriptor: fopen without corresponding fclose.

vulnerabilities.description: Off-by-one loop writes past array bounds

CWE805_wrong_length.cpp.description: Buffer access with incorrect length value: memcpy uses strlen(src) without checking dst size.

CWE835_infinite_loop.cpp.description: Infinite loop: unsigned int >= 0 is always true.

CWE843_type_confusion.cpp.description: Type confusion: unsafe cast to TypeB without verifying actual type.
